summary: Comprehensive testing of AJPL Calculator iteration 10 with 7 new features. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features are properly implemented.
passed_tests: Feature #1: Making charges display - calc_engine stores making_per_gram for percentage type making charges, BillPage displays 'x%' with subscript showing '₹X/g'
Feature #2: Admin bills grouped by date - AdminDashboard shows date headers (e.g., '2026-02-14') with bill count, bills display datetime, salesman, weight, price details
Feature #3: Single-device session login - Sessions created for non-admin users on login, old sessions deactivated. Admin can view active sessions and terminate them via /admin/sessions endpoints
Feature #4: Daily serial numbers - Bills have daily_serial field starting from 1 each day, created_date stored in YYYY-MM-DD format. MMI toggle (mmi_entered field) works via PUT /api/bills/{id}/mmi
Feature #5: Photo lightbox - Photos open in lightbox when clicked from any role (no canEdit() check on click handler)
Feature #6: Item names editable - PUT /api/item-names/{id} renames items, ItemNameManagement has pencil edit button with inline text input
Feature #7: Feedback additional comments - FeedbackPage has additional comments textarea at bottom, POST /api/bills/{id}/feedback accepts additional_comments field
Admin multi-login - Admin login does NOT create session in sessions collection (multi-login allowed)
Session list - GET /api/admin/sessions returns active sessions with user details
MMI toggle - Correctly toggles mmi_entered field between true/false
critical_code_review_comments: Making charges display changed from 'x% of 24KT' to 'x%' with subscript '₹X/g' in BillPage.js lines 316-324
Session management for single-device login implemented in server.py verify_otp and login endpoints
Daily serial numbers assigned via _get_daily_serial() function in server.py
Item name edit endpoint at PUT /api/item-names/{item_id}
FeedbackPage additional comments textarea at lines 96-105

admin.method: Admin Login link on login page

seed_data_creation: Created feedback question 'How was your overall experience?' for testing feedback form
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 adds 7 new features: 1) Making charges display shows 'x%' with subscript '₹X/g' (making_per_gram stored in calc_engine), 2) Admin bills grouped by date with datetime/salesman/weight/price/serial, 3) Single-device session for non-admin (sessions collection tracks active sessions, admin can terminate), 4) Daily serial numbers (daily_serial field) and MMI toggle (mmi_entered field), 5) Photo lightbox works for all roles, 6) Item names editable via pencil button, 7) Feedback form has additional_comments textarea. OTP mocked - codes shown on admin dashboard.

verified_features.making_per_gram: calc_engine.py calculate_making_charge returns making_per_gram for percentage type, BillPage.js displays in subscript
verified_features.admin_date_grouped_bills: AdminDashboard.js groups bills by created_date with date header, shows serial number, weight, exec, phone
verified_features.session_management: server.py verify_otp and login create sessions for non-admin, admin can GET/DELETE sessions
verified_features.daily_serial: server.py _get_daily_serial() counts bills by created_date and returns next serial
verified_features.photo_lightbox: BillPage.js onClick on photo sets lightboxImg for all roles (no permission check)
verified_features.item_name_edit: server.py update_item_name at PUT /item-names/{id}, ItemNameManagement.js has edit button
verified_features.feedback_comments: FeedbackPage.js has additionalComments state and textarea, server.py stores in feedback_responses

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
